hero.badge: Premium software engineering for modern businesses
hero.description: From full-stack web applications to cloud architecture and AI-powered tools, we craft scalable solutions that drive real business outcomes.

services.heading: Engineering Services
services.description: Expert software engineering tailored to your needs.

items.title: Web & Mobile Apps
items.desc: Full-stack web and mobile applications built with React, Next.js, Node.js, and modern frameworks.

items.title: Cloud Architecture
items.desc: Scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS, Azure, and GCP - migration, optimization, and management.

items.title: API Development
items.desc: Robust RESTful and GraphQL APIs with focus on security, performance, and developer experience.

items.title: Frontend Engineering
items.desc: Beautiful, responsive UIs with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

items.title: Team Leadership
items.desc: Technical team lead services - mentoring, code reviews, sprint planning, and delivery management.

items.title: Tech Consulting
items.desc: Architecture reviews, technology selection, and strategic guidance for your engineering team.

about.heading: We engineer software that powers your growth
about.p1: DevFactors is a software engineering consultancy founded by Anish Abid, a Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications and leading engineering teams.
about.p2: We specialize in modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems - React, Next.js, Node.js, NestJS, and MongoDB - delivering end-to-end solutions for startups and enterprises.

items.name: Sarah Chen
items.quote: Anish completely transformed our monolithic backend into a scalable microservices architecture. The migration was seamless, and our deployment frequency went from weekly to multiple times per day.

items.name: Marcus Rivera
items.quote: Working with DevFactors was the best decision we made for our platform. The team delivered ahead of schedule, and the code quality was exceptional.

items.name: Emily Zhang
items.quote: Anish led our frontend team through a complete migration from Angular to React. His technical leadership and mentoring elevated the entire team.

items.name: James Walker
items.quote: The dashboard Anish built for our AI analytics platform is incredible. It handles millions of data points in real-time with zero lag.

items.name: Priya Patel
items.quote: From architecture review to final deployment, Anish brought a level of professionalism and technical depth that is rare to find.

items.name: David Kim
items.quote: I had the pleasure of being mentored by Anish early in my career. His code review feedback was invaluable.

contact.heading: Let's build something great together
contact.description: Have a project in mind? Reach out and I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.subject: Subject

footer.description: Professional software engineering and technology consulting. Building scalable, maintainable solutions for modern businesses.
